description: A candid color event photograph. It shows a large group of roughly 25 to 30 U.S. Army soldiers in OCP and multicam camouflage uniforms and patrol caps posing together for a group portrait on an outdoor concrete plaza under a partly cloudy blue sky, with a black metal fence and green grass behind them. One soldier near the center front holds a small handheld American flag and a folded paper or certificate. The photograph has natural daylight; there is no overlaid slogan text, no agency seal graphic, and no added styling. The only on-image marking is a small faint photographer or venue watermark logo in the bottom-left corner. Per the tweet, these are six new U.S. citizens (active-duty service members stationed at Fort Campbell) photographed at a naturalization ceremony at Oak Grove Racetrack, Kentucky.
notable_text: (none on image; small venue watermark logo only)
